3202650.name: A Beautiful Collection of Darkness: Volume 1 - A Work of Art
3202650.description:
Note: This is a "Support the Devs Pack + Original Soundtrack" for A Work of Art. This DLC does not affect in-game content.

Thank you so much for choosing to support us in our journey while rocking out to tasty jams! It really means the world to us and we appreciate you more than words can express! ♥

Welcome to A Beautiful Collection of Darkness: Volume 1 - A Work of Art!

This is the 1st Volume in our new series - A Beautiful Collection of Darkness. You can find our other volumes on Steam!

In this Supporter Pack / OST + Art Pack, explore a grim, dark, invigorating musical experience sure to get your heart racing, blood pumping, and head banging!

Featured in Volume 1 are all songs from A Work of Art! We've also included two bonus tracks, and over a dozen pictures of original art found in the game!

(Files come in standard MP3 format with optional download of WAV, FLAC, & OGG.)

Special thanks to Randumb Studios & "A Beautiful Collection of Darkness".

(Joshua Benson, Amy Nguyen, Samantha Reed, Sven Brännström, Billy "The Brain" Bozeman, Erica Chavez, and Shamus O'Reiley.)
